name: Particle System Basic
description: UNVERIFIED — Foundational create_particle_system template: a grid-SOP emitter feeds a Particle SOP with a constant Force CHOP for gentle drift and a tunable lifetime, rendered through a Geometry COMP with a point-sprite material. Controls expose birth rate, lifetime, and force strength so the artist can dial it without reopening the network. Use as a starting point for any particle-driven look.

nodes.name: emitter
nodes.comment: Grid of emission points feeding the particle SOP

nodes.name: force
nodes.comment: Constant upward force; drives the particle wind input

nodes.name: particle
nodes.comment: Particle simulation; this is the rendered geometry inside geo

preview_description: UNVERIFIED — A gentle column of glowing point-sprites rising from a square 8x8 grid against black, with birth rate, lifetime, and vertical force live-tweakable.
